source: label-permutation chance from committed A3 run (results/hardening/a3_combinations.json), not recomputed
note: permutation floor = shuffle gene labels of GT, rescore recovered edges (5 seeds). Reported on the PRIMARY within-regime GT (GIES-on-real-doubles). Anchored-GT contrasts (A/B/C) are the discriminator's headline numbers.
caveat: The primary within-regime GT has HIGH permutation chance (compressed dynamic range: 20-gene partitions cap co-partition recall ~9.6%). The decisive discriminator contrast is B-vs-C on the ANCHORED GT (equivalence-certified, TOST p=0.001), which is independent of this floor.
